label: Transparent glowworm threads motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Glowworm transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a complete isolated glowworm motif for a design-system catalog, on a removable chroma-key background.
Subject: A luminous New Zealand-style glowworm larva suspended from delicate sticky silk threads, with small translucent amber-brown segmented body, subtle dark head, and many hanging bead-like glowworm threads emitting blue-green bioluminescent points. The motif should feel like a limestone cave wayfinding symbol: cool cyan glow, teal halos around thread droplets, fine thread detail, crisp biological form.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding, vertical hanging thread cluster and larva visible without cropping; no cave wall or background objects, no cast shadow.
Chroma-key background: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff background for removal, uniform color only, no shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, floor plane, watermark, or text.
Constraints: do not use #ff00ff anywhere in the subject; no firefly beetle, no butterfly, no fantasy fairy, no landscape, no rock wall, no hand, no props, no text.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Glowworm light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Glowworm, derived from the visible glowworm larva and glowing silk-thread motif.
Input image: Use the loaded transparent glowworm motif as the source reference for color, texture, shape language, thread lines, glowing droplets, amber body translucency, limestone cave context, and blue-green bioluminescence.
Canvas: 16:9 high-resolution design board, target 3840x2160, polished luminous wayfinding system presentation. Preserve readable large section labels and generous spacing.
Required visible sections: Morphous Glowworm, Glowworm Threads, Light Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Visual system: pale limestone surfaces, cave mist background, charcoal cave ink, cyan and blue-green primary actions, teal glow focus rings, amber larva secondary accents, thin thread dividers, droplet badges, waypoint navigation rails, softly luminous chart points, cave-rim texture samples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb/wayfinding, command palette, tables, metrics, line/bar/donut charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, spacing/radius/shadow examples, sample app screen.
Typography guidance: include English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with concise visible labels; clean sans UI with measured tracking, legible at gallery preview scale.
Constraints: no generic neon cyber UI, no saturated purple gradient, no unrelated red/orange dominance, no firefly beetle, no fantasy fairy, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Glowworm.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous Glowworm dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate one comprehensive dark-mode shadcn/tweakcn design-system board named Morphous Glowworm that feels like the light board translated into a limestone cave night interface.
Input images: Use the loaded transparent glowworm motif as the source reference, and preserve the same system sections, UI coverage, and wayfinding/dashboard structure shown in the light-board direction.
Canvas: 16:9 high-resolution design board, target 3840x2160, polished dark luminous wayfinding system presentation. Use large readable labels and avoid tiny token text.
Required visible sections: Morphous Glowworm, Glowworm Threads, Dark Mode, Palette, Typography, Japanese Typography, Components, Navigation, Dashboard/Data, Charts, Forms, Table, Command/Search, Status States, Texture, Radius, Spacing, Shadow, Tokens, Sample Usage.
Visual system: cave-black background, charcoal limestone cards, blue-green bioluminescent primary controls, cyan droplet focus rings, teal waypoint rails, amber translucent larva secondary accents, pale limestone text, fine silk-thread dividers, glowing chart nodes, dark cave texture samples.
UI coverage: buttons, icon buttons, inputs, selects, textarea, checkboxes, radios, switches, tabs, badges, alerts, cards, sidebar navigation, breadcrumb/wayfinding, command palette, tables, metrics, line/bar/donut charts, forms, empty/loading/error/success states, token swatches, spacing/radius/shadow examples, sample app screen.
Typography guidance: include English UI guidance and Japanese UI guidance with concise visible labels; clean sans UI, high contrast, legible at gallery preview scale.
Constraints: no generic pure-black neon cyber UI, no saturated purple gradient, no unrelated red/orange dominance, no firefly beetle, no fantasy fairy, no tiny unreadable text, no watermark, no misspelling of Morphous Glowworm.
